title: pouzolzia frondosa
intro: Pouzolzia frondosa, also known as 'Chhotra', is a perennial climber plant native to tropical Asia, belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pouzolzia frondosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. Pouzolzia frondosa is often prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and ointments, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
